name: zvideo_buff_clip_coord_to_range
description: zVideo_buff::ClipCoordToRange clamps one coordinate to an inclusive min/max range and returns the signed delta applied.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation for 0x4a69c0 validates returning zero for in-range coordinates, clamping below-min or above-max coordinates, and returning original minus clamped coordinate.
The native clip-coordinate smoke verifies in-range, below-min, and above-max paths including the returned signed delta and stored coordinate.
binary_safe_evidence: VC6 cl 12.00.8168 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison passed for ?ClipCoordToRange@zVideo_buff@@YIHPAHHH@Z at 0x4a69c0 with zero unmasked mismatches and 5 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed.
